response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Zettai Idol Yamenai de' by =LOVE from on-screen text. Performed by Hololive 1st Gen. Searched: '"絶対アイドル辞めないで" Japanese and English lyrics'.\n2. Identified '電脳大宣言' by Hololive 1st Gen from on-screen text. Searched: '"電脳大宣言" Hololive Japanese and English lyrics'. Found no direct lyrics for this specific track, marked as unavailable.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a live performance medley by Hololive 1st Generation (Akai Haato, Shirakami Fubuki, Natsuiro Matsuri, Aki Rosenthal), containing two songs with a brief intermission.

scenes.description: Hololive 1st Gen performs the song 'Zettai Idol Yamenai de' with on-screen text displaying the title.
scenes.song_title: 絶対アイドル辞めないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
絶対 アイドル辞めないで（ずっと）
輝いてる君を見たい
もう ずっとずっとずっと
ステージにいて
私がもし君のとこ 離れたなら
君はちょっと寂しくなるかな
いじわる 考える
好きな人がいるのなら 内緒にして
ねえ神様は 将来と指輪を
どこかに隠してね
君の「好き」は おまじない
解けない魔法で
それでももっと好きだ！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Absolutely, never stop being an Idol. (Ever)
I want to see you shining
Already, forever and ever
Stay on the stage
If I ever left your side
Would you feel a little lonely?
If you're thinking mean thoughts
If you have someone you like
Keep it a secret
Hey, God, hide the future and the ring somewhere
Your "I love you" is a charm
I don't need magic to be broken
I still love it even more!

scenes.description: Intermission featuring members of Hololive 1st Gen chatting on stage.
Hololive 1st Gen performs the song '電脳大宣言'.
